summary: Comprehensive testing of ATOM AI app multi-agent system features. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified super admin and regular user login flows, SUPER ADMIN badge, UNLIMITED vs credits display, and agent selector modal with all modes/agents.
passed_tests: Agents Endpoint - returns 5 agents (Nova, Forge, Sentinel, Atlas, Pulse) and 4 modes (E-1, E-2, Prototype, Mobile)
Super Admin Login - correct role, is_super_admin=true, credits=-1 (unlimited)
Super Admin Credits Endpoint - unlimited=true, credits=null
Super Admin /auth/me Endpoint - correct super admin info
Regular User Login - correct role=user, is_super_admin=false, credits balance
Regular User Credits Endpoint - unlimited=false, credits shows balance
Regular User /auth/me Endpoint - correct user info
Chat accepts mode parameter (e1, e2, prototype, mobile)
UI: Super admin sees SUPER ADMIN badge and UNLIMITED
UI: Regular user sees credits balance (10.00) without SUPER ADMIN or UNLIMITED badges
UI: Agent Selector Modal shows all modes (E-1, E-2, Prototype, Mobile)
UI: Agent Selector Modal shows all agents (Nova, Forge, Sentinel, Atlas, Pulse)
seed_data_creation: Created super admin and regular user accounts via registration endpoint if they didn't exist
context_for_next_testing_agent: All multi-agent features are working correctly. Super admin (Antoniohoshaw6@gmail.com) has SUPER ADMIN badge and UNLIMITED access. Regular users see numeric credits balance. Agent selector modal correctly displays all 5 agents and 4 modes. Chat API accepts agent/mode/ultra_thinking params. Note: LLM API may have budget limit errors - this is expected as per the agent_to_agent_context_note.

super_admin_login.evidence: Super admin sees SUPER ADMIN badge (gold) and UNLIMITED badge (purple)

regular_user_login.evidence: Regular user sees credits balance (10.00) with Coins icon, no SUPER ADMIN or UNLIMITED badges

api_endpoints./api/agents: Returns all agents and modes correctly
api_endpoints./api/user/credits: Returns credits for regular user, unlimited for super admin
